title: Titiz Radiator Brush, Cleaning Brush, 70 cm Long, 45 mm Diameter, 1 of 4 Variants
description: Radiator core brush. It is now very easy to clean the radiators with the radiator cleaning brush With its easily bendable structure and hard dense brush, it provides quick and perfect cleaning inside your heating pads. Thanks to the bristles of the brush, it fills into the brush and goes with the brush on the cleaned inner surface. Thanks to its flexible metal structure, it allows easy cleaning even in "S" shaped chambers. It can be made with water, washed and cleaned. It dries quickly. It can be restored to its former shape again and again. It is made of high quality plastic. It is ISO 9001:2008-TSEK certified. Product dimensions: 70 cm (27 inches), length: 4 cm
